name: Olivia Mouras
specialty: Adult Psychiatric & Mental Health Nurse Practitioner
visit_reasons: Attention-Deficit / Hyperactivity Disorder (ADHD); Depression; New Patient Visit; Psychiatry Consultation; Sleep Problems
meta_description: Olivia Mouras holds a Bachelor of Science in Nursing from LaSalle University and a Master's degree in Primary Care as a Family Nurse Practitioner from Drexel University. While gaining valuable experience at the Hospital of the University of Pennsylvania, Olivia recognized a pressing need for improved access to psychiatric mental health services. This realization led her to obtain a Post-Master's Certification as a Psychiatric Mental Health Nurse Practitioner Across the Lifespan.
